text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
The Arima Kinen is a celebration of racing. A
grand festival that sparkles once a year.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
A tangible excitement takes hold of both the
racers and the fans as the end of the year
approaches.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
At last, the results of the preliminary fan
popularity poll have been announced.

text_block_list.name: Daiwa Scarlet
text_block_list.text:
I'm first place! Trainer! They voted me as number
one!

text_block_list.name: Daiwa Scarlet
text_block_list.text:
Hehe! And look! They wrote so many comments
about me!

text_block_list.name: Daiwa Scarlet
text_block_list.text:
"I'm super excited for the Arima Kinen!" "I've been
your fan since the Oka Sho!"

text_block_list.name: Daiwa Scarlet
text_block_list.text:
"I can't wait to see you do even better than in the
autumn Tenno Sho!" "Go and beat Vodka!"

text_block_list.name: Daiwa Scarlet
text_block_list.text:
"I was hoping to see Vodka run, but since she
won't be there, I voted for her rival."

text_block_list.name: Daiwa Scarlet
text_block_list.text:
..."I hope Daiwa Scarlet will try twice as hard for
Vodka's sake."

text_block_list.name: Daiwa Scarlet
text_block_list.text:
Hmph! What are you looking so concerned
about? I'm completely fine.

text_block_list.name: Daiwa Scarlet
text_block_list.text:
It's just... annoying, is all. It's like I'll never be free
of her.

text_block_list.name: Daiwa Scarlet
text_block_list.text: I'm the one who won the autumn Tenno Sho.

text_block_list.name: Daiwa Scarlet
text_block_list.text:
I'm the one everyone expects to win the Arima
Kinen.

text_block_list.name: Daiwa Scarlet
text_block_list.text:
I'm the one who surpassed Vodka, right? So I
can't afford to lose now.

text_block_list.name: Daiwa Scarlet
text_block_list.text: Hmph. What do you sound so worried for?

text_block_list.name: Daiwa Scarlet
text_block_list.text:
Come on, we need to get going. There's still lots
of preparation to be done for the Arima!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Daiwa Scarlet heads to the track with a strained
expression.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Later, I hear through the grapevine that Vodka
has settled on a date to head back overseas.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: That date is today.

text_block_list.name: Daiwa Scarlet
text_block_list.text: Hm? What's up with you?
choice_data_list: Don't you want to see her off?
Don't you want to see her off?

text_block_list.name: Daiwa Scarlet
text_block_list.text: You mean Vodka? Not particularly.

text_block_list.name: Daiwa Scarlet
text_block_list.text:
We've seen each other so many times by this
point, there's nothing else left to say.

text_block_list.name: Daiwa Scarlet
text_block_list.text:
More importantly, I have a press conference this
afternoon. I need to get rea―

text_block_list.name: Tokai Teio
text_block_list.text: Hey! Scarlet! Have you heard the news?!

text_block_list.name: Daiwa Scarlet
text_block_list.text: Teio? What's got you all worked up?

text_block_list.name: Tokai Teio
text_block_list.text: It's Vodka!

text_block_list.name: Tokai Teio
text_block_list.text:
She went to the airport today, but didn't get on
the plane!

text_block_list.name: Daiwa Scarlet
text_block_list.text: What in the world is she thinking?!

text_block_list.name: Tokai Teio
text_block_list.text: Scarlet?! Where are you going?!
choice_data_list: Which airport did Vodka go to?!

text_block_list.name: Tokai Teio
text_block_list.text: Um... Let's see... I think it was...

text_block_list.name: Daiwa Scarlet
text_block_list.text: Pant, pant...

text_block_list.name: Daiwa Scarlet
text_block_list.text: Huh! Trainer?! What are you doing here?!

text_block_list.name: Daiwa Scarlet
text_block_list.text: You big dummy...

text_block_list.name: Daiwa Scarlet
text_block_list.text: Fine, you search over there! I'll take this area!

text_block_list.name: Daiwa Scarlet
text_block_list.text: Report back as soon as you find her!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Both Daiwa Scarlet and I dash around the airport
searching for Vodka.

text_block_list.name: Daiwa Scarlet
text_block_list.text: I found her!

text_block_list.name: Vodka
text_block_list.text: Whoa! The hell are you doing here?!

text_block_list.name: Daiwa Scarlet
text_block_list.text: I should be asking you the same thing!

text_block_list.name: Daiwa Scarlet
text_block_list.text:
You said you were going abroad! Why are you
still here?!

text_block_list.name: Daiwa Scarlet
text_block_list.text: I'm running in the Arima without you! And I was going to win it precisely because you were gone!

text_block_list.name: Daiwa Scarlet
text_block_list.text:
Because even if you aren't in Japan—you're still
my greatest rival!

text_block_list.name: Daiwa Scarlet
text_block_list.text:
That's why I decided I'd definitely take number
one here! To show you how strong I am!

text_block_list.name: Daiwa Scarlet
text_block_list.text:
But if you're just going to mess around, then what
was even the point?!

text_block_list.name: Vodka
text_block_list.text: Pfft... Bwahaha!

text_block_list.name: Daiwa Scarlet
text_block_list.text: What's so funny?! I'm being serious here!

text_block_list.name: Vodka
text_block_list.text:
Ahh... Okay, my bad. But I think you got the
wrong idea.

text_block_list.name: Vodka
text_block_list.text:
The plane was having mechanical troubles, so my
departure date got changed. That's why I missed
my flight.

text_block_list.name: Daiwa Scarlet
text_block_list.text: What?!

text_block_list.name: Vodka
text_block_list.text:
Haha, guess that's why my phone's been blowin'
up. There must've been a bit of a
misunderstanding.

text_block_list.name: Vodka
text_block_list.text:
Though... "My greatest rival," huh? Quite the
declaration.

text_block_list.name: Vodka
text_block_list.text: But Scarlet, beating me isn't your real goal, is it?

text_block_list.name: Vodka
text_block_list.text:
I thought you wanted "Daiwa Scarlet" to be the
first name that comes to mind when people think
of the number one Umamusume.

text_block_list.name: Vodka
text_block_list.text:
Are you gonna get there by crying and pouting
like you're doin' right now?

text_block_list.name: Vodka
text_block_list.text:
I mean, fine. You want me to stay here and run
the Arima with ya? Would that give you closure?

text_block_list.name: Vodka
text_block_list.text:
Just be warned though: if I'm runnin', I'm taking
the number one spot!

text_block_list.name: Daiwa Scarlet
text_block_list.text: As if I'd agree to that in a million years!

text_block_list.name: Daiwa Scarlet
text_block_list.text: You'll take number one over my dead body! I'm number one! Me!

text_block_list.name: Vodka
text_block_list.text: Haha. Now that's the Scarlet I know.

text_block_list.name: Vodka
text_block_list.text:
So get out there and knock 'em dead. I'll see ya
'round.

text_block_list.name: Daiwa Scarlet
text_block_list.text:
You too. You'd better not lose to anyone other
than me... idiot.

text_block_list.name: Daiwa Scarlet
text_block_list.text:
Ugh... Now I'm going to be exhausted during my
press conference.

text_block_list.name: Daiwa Scarlet
text_block_list.text: It's all her fault...
choice_data_list: At least you saw this through to the end.
At least you saw this through to the end.

text_block_list.name: Daiwa Scarlet
text_block_list.text: ...Hmph!

text_block_list.name: Staff
text_block_list.text:
Let's begin the press conference. If you have any
questions, please raise your hand...

text_block_list.name: Reporters
text_block_list.text:
Daiwa Scarlet! Over here, please! You took the
top spot in this year's popularity poll...

text_block_list.name: Reporters
text_block_list.text:
How do you feel about going into the race with
that under your belt, given that your biggest
rival, Vodka, is passing on it?

text_block_list.name: Daiwa Scarlet
text_block_list.text: Hehe, isn't it obvious?

text_block_list.name: Daiwa Scarlet
text_block_list.text: I'll be number one whether she's there or not.

text_block_list.name: Daiwa Scarlet
text_block_list.text:
Once the fans see me run in the Arima Kinen,
they'll forget about Vodka, and everybody else
besides.

text_block_list.name: Daiwa Scarlet
text_block_list.text:
I want to put on a fabulous performance that will
live forever in your memories. And why, you ask?

text_block_list.name: Daiwa Scarlet
text_block_list.text:
Because I'm Daiwa Scarlet—the number one
Umamusume!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
That line makes the front page of the next day's
newspaper.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Daiwa Scarlet takes a look at the headline, and
though she acts aloof, it does earn a slight smirk
from her.
